scope: Issue #140 のすべての作業計画タスク (Phase 1: 1.1〜1.8, Phase 2: 2.1〜2.5, Phase 3: 3.1〜3.2, Phase 4: 4.1〜4.3) を TDD で実装
approach: TDD Red-Green-Refactor cycle per task, with strict ordering per design §8 (Layer 4-pre yaml test → Layer 4-A test helpers → Layer 3-B norm check → regression → norm tests → skill desc tests → skill/docs updates → final verification)
